column8: She asked him, "Why did you make me go out tonight?"
column9: I said to Jim, "Where were you last month?"
column10: She says to me, "Do you think it is right?"
column11: The writer said to the editor, "Will the book have been published by spring?"
column12: He says, "What are you doing there, Liz?"
column13: She asked me, "Are these articles still being printed?"
column14: He said to her, "Why don't you spend a few days with Alice?"
column15: Sheila asked Kate, "Have you got married?"
column16: Lucy asked Jo, "Why wasn't the doctor sent for?"
column17: He said to Bert, "When was all this decided?"
